info.title: midirec
info.description:
Copyright (c) 2021 Ignacio Calvo
This tool allows you to permanently record all your MIDI activity. It will save
a file each time you stop playing for some (customizable) duration.
record     (Default Verb) Records MIDI to files
list       Lists MIDI Inputs
help       Display more information on a specific command.
version    Display version information.
